EnsureBillable.description: If `true`, forces verification of payment information even if the offer is free. Returns `403` if no payment information is registered.

DateStart.description: Ignore balance lines before this date

DateEnd.description: Ignore balance lines after this date

ForceOffline.description: If `true`, forces the invoice to be offline even for customers with automated payment (card, direct debit)

NoteLocalized.description: Note printed at the bottom of the invoice PDF, above the customer service section

example.NoteLocalized: I love you as long as you pay. ;)
